sections.sectionTitle: Topa Hong Pai Ding Kiging Un

verses.text: Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, hih thu hong pian'ding hun tawh kisai kong gelh ding uh kisamlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hong pai ding Ni pen zan-a gutate bangin theihkholh lohin hong tung ding hi, ci-in note in teltakin na theihsa uh ahi hi

Mite in, “Thu khempeuh a hoih laitak hi a, bangmah patauhna ding omlo hi,” a cih laitakin thakhatthu-in amaute tungah siatna hong tungvat ding hi. Nausuah natna bangin gimna thuak ding uh a, kuamah suaktalo ding uh hi
Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, note ahih leh khuamial gamtatnate gamtalo na hih manun guta bangin tua Ni hong tun'vat ciangin lamdang na sa kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh, khuavak gamtatna a nei, sun khuavak mite na hi uh a, eite pen khuamial gamtatna a nei, zan khuamial mite ihi kei hi
Tua ahih ciangin midangte bangin eite mawk om hithiat loin khua phawkin pilvang ni
Zan khuamial pen mite' ihmut hithiat hun leh zukham hun ahi hi
Ahi zongin eite pen khuavak gamtatna a nei sun khuavak mi ihih manin pilvang ni. Awmdal bangin upna leh itna bulhin, siklukhu bangin i lamet hotkhiatna khu ni
Pasian in ama hehna a thuak dingin eite a hong teel hilo a, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin hotkhiatna a ngah dingin a hong teel ahi hi
Amah a hong paikik ciangin a hing ihi a, a si ihi zongin amah tawh i omkhawm theihna dingin eite-a' dingin amah a hong si ahi hi
Tua ahih manin tu laitakin na omzia uh mah bangin khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuh ciat ta un.
Sanggamte aw, Topa in note lam a hong lak ding leh a hong makai dingin a seh, note lakah na a hong sem mite, a kilawm a kituakin zahtakbawl un
Amau' nasepna hangin amaute nakpi takin itbawlin zahtak un. Note khatlekhat kilem takin na om un
Sanggamte aw, a thadah mite hilh un la, a meidawite hanthawnin, a zawngkhal mite huh un la, hihbang mite ngongbawl kei un
Gitlohna lamsang kuamah kithuk loin, note khatlekhat tung, mi khempeuh tungah a pha kibawl ding ngaihsutpi-in na nei un
Lungdam tawntungin
thu ngen niloh un la
bangbang hong piang ta leh na lungdamna uh Pasian tungah ko tawntung un. Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin na nuntakna sung uhah hih bangzia-in na om ding uh Pasian in a hong deih ahi hi
Kha Siangtho nasepna dongtangsak kei un la
thuhilhnate simmawhbawl kei un
Thu khempeuh entel pha un la, a hoihte kemin
a sia lamsang peuhmah pelh un

Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in na khempeuhah siangthona leh kicin'na hong pia hen la, na kha uh, na nuntakna uh, leh na pumpi uh hoihtakin hong kem hen la, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong pai ciangin mawhna khat zong a nei hetlo dingin hong bawl ta hen
Note a hong sam i Pa Pasian a thutak hi a, a thuciamte khempeuh hong tungsak taktak ding hi
Sanggamte aw, kote-a' ding thu hong ngetsak un
Thu uppih mi khempeuh khatlekhat a siangtho ki-itna lungsim tawh kinamin na kihopih un
Thu um mi khempeuh' zakdingin hih lai na simna dingun Topa' min tawh ka hong thum hi
I Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha note tungah hong tung ta hen.
